# minio_bucket_metadata_export (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_bucket_metadata_export" "example" {
  bucket = "my-bucket"
}

output "metadata" {
  value = data.minio_bucket_metadata_export.example.metadata
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bucket` (String) Name of the bucket to export metadata from.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `metadata` (String, Sensitive) Base64-encoded zip stream of the bucket metadata export.
